image_prompt: A futuristic city skyline at sunset with flying cars and neon lights reflecting on wet streets
animation_prompt: Camera slowly pans left across the skyline, neon signs flicker, rain falls gently

image_prompt: An ancient forest with giant glowing mushrooms and fireflies dancing between the trees at night
animation_prompt: Fireflies drift upward slowly, mushrooms pulse with soft light, mist rolls across the ground

image_prompt: A lone astronaut standing on Mars surface looking at Earth rising over the red horizon
animation_prompt: Earth slowly rises above the horizon, dust particles float in the thin atmosphere, astronaut turns to face it
